overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning with an ascent from a concrete stairwell into a neon-lit urban plaza. The player character walks through covered commercial corridors and open streets, passing iconic billboards and storefronts with heavy use of neon lighting and reflective wet surfaces, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell ascending from underground passage

events.description: emerging from stairwell into open urban plaza with neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward the city street level, emerging from an underpass

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow safety lines ascending from below ground level
multi-story building with distinctive horizontal yellow neon strip lighting on each floor
large red illuminated billboard displaying white number 54 against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell looking upward. As the camera ascends, a futuristic cityscape emerges with a distinctive yellow-lit building on the left and a prominent red '54' billboard visible ahead against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with view of burning skyscraper

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal thick black smoke and orange flames emanating from upper floors of distant skyscraper
camera pans down from burning building and turns left to walk along street level

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the burning skyscraper before turning left and continuing along the wet street

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street in the distance

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with visible flames and thick black smoke billowing from upper floors
open paved area with reflective wet surfaces and street furniture

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open plaza, the camera reveals a dramatic view of a skyscraper burning in the distance, with thick smoke rising against the night sky. The scene is dominated by neon lighting and wet reflective pavement. The camera observes the fire before turning left to walk along the street where a red car passes by.

events.description: entering covered area beneath massive highway overpass with red neon lighting
transitioning from open street lighting to red and cyan neon illumination under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the street beneath the overpass, passing parked vehicles and approaching commercial signage

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect with red underside lighting
large illuminated advertisement with text REAL MAN'S SMELL and product imagery
row of dark-colored vehicles parked along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a street beneath a massive highway overpass, transitioning from the open plaza into a covered urban space with dramatic red neon lighting. Parked cars line the left side while large commercial billboards become visible on the walls ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian commercial corridor with large advertisements

events.description: passing Prefab City storefront with glowing orange and green signage
moving from red-lit billboard area to cyan and yellow neon lighting near Synchrone sign

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway observing various storefronts including Prefab City and illuminated billboards

entered.detail: retail entrance with orange neon sign reading PREFAB CITY and green interior lighting
large advertisement displaying FERVID with fashion imagery
circular neon sign with concentric rings and SYNCHRONE text in cyan and red
yellow and white striped concrete block barrier on the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered commercial corridor, the camera passes the Prefab City storefront with its distinctive orange neon signage. The environment features massive wall-mounted advertisements and transitions from red to cyan neon lighting as the walkway continues beneath the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor between commercial buildings with food vendors

events.description: passing food vendor stalls with illuminated displays on the right side of the walkway
emerging from fully covered area to section with partial sky visibility between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing through the urban corridor, passing by illuminated building entrances and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person standing near food stall browsing items on display

entered.detail: street vendor carts with illuminated displays and umbrellas selling food items
contemporary building facade with large glass windows and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past food vendor stalls on the right, with the camera moving between a modern glass building on the left and commercial structures on the right. The corridor gradually opens up, revealing more of the night sky between the towering buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between high-rise buildings leading to open plaza

events.description: approaching open plaza with large El Coyote Cojo neon sign visible at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the final covered section toward the illuminated plaza ahead where the El Coyote Cojo sign is visible

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with cowboy hat logo and EL COYOTE COJO text
storefront with blue neon signage and display windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrower passage between buildings, approaching an open plaza. The iconic El Coyote Cojo neon sign becomes visible ahead, marking the destination. The modern glass building recedes into the distance as the camera moves toward the more open area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a stark concrete stairwell into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza and its subsequent covered corridors. It begins by climbing upward toward a dark sky, where a yellow-lit building and a prominent red 54 billboard first emerge. As the camera emerges into the open plaza, the view expands to reveal a burning skyscraper emitting thick smoke over wet, reflective pavement before turning left to follow a red car along the street. The scene then shifts beneath a massive highway overpass, transitioning from the open air into a sheltered urban space dominated by dramatic red neon lighting and parked cars. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the commercial corridor, passing the orange signage of a Prefab City storefront as the ambient light shifts from red to cyan beneath the towering overhead structure.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a commercial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by gliding past food vendor stalls, moving through a space framed by a modern glass building on the left and dense commercial structures on the right. As the corridor expands, the towering architecture recedes to reveal more of the dark night sky overhead. The scene then shifts into a narrower passage between buildings, creating a sense of compression before the view breaks open toward a destination. Finally, the camera emerges into the plaza as the iconic El Coyote Cojo neon sign comes into full view.
